cpSection: Film Quality and Manufacturing Processes Course 3.0

lessons.title: Indications, Discontinuities, and Defects Defined
objectives: Explain how acceptance criteria determine when a discontinuity becomes a defect

lessons.title: Inherent, Processing, and Service Discontinuities
objectives: Classify discontinuities by origin: inherent, processing, and service
Give examples of each discontinuity class and where they originate
